action.reasoning: Observation: Fingerprint MLP Val MAE=0.1723, above the 0.12-0.14 SMILES ceiling. Previous SchNet test with 100 molecules worked fine. Early segfaults were likely from truncated scripts. torchmd-net imports fail. Analysis: 3D methods can achieve 0.03-0.06 MAE vs 0.12-0.14 for fingerprints. SchNet with PyG is the best path. Need to try full-scale SchNet training. Decision: Write SchNet training script, unified predict.py, run training. Keep fingerprint checkpoint as backup.
